_comment: Add this configuration to your Claude Desktop claude_desktop_config.json file under 'mcpServers'.
_instructions: 1. Install sage-mcp: pip install sage-mcp  (or: uvx sage-mcp for ephemeral use)
2. Copy the 'mcpServers' block below into your Claude Desktop config file.
3. Restart Claude Desktop. You will see 'sage' listed in available tools.
